nodes.label: AI as time-saving drafting tool
nodes.label_negative: Manual email drafting via employer's slow system
nodes.grounding_span: This has massively cut down on time after calls for me because the tools the employer provides are no where near as swift or intuitive

nodes.label: AI as emotional buffer in difficult customer interactions
nodes.grounding_span: ChatGPT has no ego to offend, no bias to overcome so it gave a more neutral response and I could offer that without imbedding my own emotions into it

nodes.label: Human detective work and empathy in understanding customer needs
nodes.label_negative: AI's inability to interpret unspoken meaning and provide emotional validation
nodes.grounding_span: There is a great deal of difference between what people say and what they mean, and that's always an area I've been professionally interested in

nodes.label: AI as quick delegation tool under time pressure
nodes.grounding_span: These calls are rapid fire and I do not have time to collaborate. I take the output and its either useful or not and then I need to move on

nodes.label: Covert AI use due to workplace culture
nodes.grounding_span: I now keep my use of the tools quiet as I'm sure it would be frowned upon

nodes.label: AI as inevitable industry disruptor
nodes.grounding_span: I know it coming for my job, and I'm not overly bothered

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: This has massively cut down on time after calls for me

nodes.label: Emotional well-being and reduced stress
nodes.grounding_span: Felt like a weight off my shoulders

nodes.label: Customer satisfaction and feeling heard
nodes.grounding_span: the problem doesn't go away for the cx in their head until they feel heard

nodes.label: Professional autonomy and problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I like thinking my way out of problems

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: when I realised how much time I was saving, vs what I had been doing before

nodes.label: Relief and appreciation for AI as emotional buffer
nodes.grounding_span: for me personally as a tool it was useful for that emotional distance it gave me in the situation

nodes.label: Resistance to outsourcing human empathy and detective work
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want to outsource that part of the experience

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as quick delegation tool
nodes.grounding_span: I delegate. Either what comes out works for me or it doesn't

nodes.label: Frustration with need for covert AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I now keep my use of the tools quiet as I'm sure it would be frowned upon

nodes.label: Calm acceptance of AI-driven job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: I know it coming for my job, and I'm not overly bothered

nodes.label: Pragmatic problem-solving under constraints
nodes.grounding_span: I am just trying to meet the pressures of the job with some problem solving

nodes.label: Systems-level cyclical thinking about industry patterns
nodes.grounding_span: The telecomms industry cycles through needing UK agents and then offshoring the work
